title: 2026 Oscar Best Actor Predictions
text: The 98th Academy Awards ceremony aired March 15, 2026, with Conan O'Brien hosting. Gold Derby compiled predictions from experts, editors, and top users for the Best Actor category. Timothée Chalamet for Marty Supreme had 47.88% odds as of March 4. Michael B. Jordan for Sinners had 36.20% odds. Wagner Moura for The Secret Agent had 11.77% odds. Leonardo DiCaprio for One Battle After Another had 2.59% odds. Ethan Hawke for Blue Moon had 1.57% odds. Chalamet was previously nominated twice for Call Me by Your Name and A Complete Unknown. Jordan had his first Oscar nomination. Moura and DiCaprio were both first-time nominees. DiCaprio had won previously for The Revenant with seven total nominations. Hawke had four prior nominations in acting and screenwriting categories. The odds represent combined forecasts from industry professionals tracking this year's awards race.
